authors.author: Melody Green
Melody Green
Will bei dir zur Schule gehn

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For anyone who's prayed a thousand prayers And still can't find the answer anywhere Fighting off the lie that no one cares For anyone who's out there losing hope Feeling you're forsaken and alone Clinging to the last strands of your rope

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: May God give you eyes to see, He's still greater Courage to rise and believe He's able May God be your peace in the fire you're walking through This is my prayer now This is my prayer for you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For all of those with tired and weary souls But still have faith to ask for miracles Choosing to believe He's in control

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: May God give you eyes to see, He's still greater Courage to rise and believe He's able May God be your peace in the fire you're walking through This is my prayer now This is my prayer

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: May your eyes be ever on the Lord, your helper May you find your refuge in the Lord, your shelter May you find Him closer than a brother all your days All of your days! And may your eyes be ever on the Lord, your helper May you find your refuge in the Lord, your shelter May you find Him closer than a brother all your days All of your days!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: May God give you eyes to see, He's still greater Courage to rise and believe He's able May God be your peace in the fire you're walking through This is my prayer now This is my prayer for you! For you!
